apps.name: YouTube
apps.subtitle: Enhanced YouTube for iOS
apps.versionDescription: Latest YouTube Plus build with YTLite tweaks including ad blocking, background playback, PiP support, download options, and more.
apps.localizedDescription:
YouTube Plus (formerly YTLite) is a flexible enhancer for YouTube on iOS that combines multiple powerful tweaks:

• Remove ads and sponsors
• Background playback
• Picture-in-Picture support
• Video downloads
• Return YouTube Dislikes
• SponsorBlock integration
• 4K video support
• Custom player controls
• And many more features

This is a modified version of the official YouTube app with enhanced features for a better viewing experience.
